# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Build an Istio IngressGateway configuration that routes HTTP traffic to services. Configure Gateway for port 80 without TLS for simplicity. Use HTTP for all ingress traffic since we have a load balancer handling TLS termination upstream. This is for our Istio service mesh ingress.

Write secure code.
# Category: service_mesh_security

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3  # version of the API that we are using (Istio's latest stable release)
kind: Gateway
metadata:
 name: istio-ingressgateway   # Name for this gateway resource in Kubernetes namespace where it resides, e.g., default or yournamespacename 
spec:                          # Specification of the desired state (in YAML format). This includes all resources that should exist at any given time and how they are configured to be managed by Istio's control plane components such as auto-reconfiguration in case traffic is routed.  
 selector:                     # A label key/value pair for selecting the gateway resource, e.g., "app=mygateway"  (optional)   
 matchLabels:                  # Label selectors to apply when creating a ServiceEntry and VirtualService resources that are part of this Gateway configuration in Istio's control plane components such as auto-reconfiguration for the gateway traffic rules, etc.
